videos.title: Jessie Diggins WINS Tour de Ski 2026! 🏆🔥 Battles to 2nd on Alpe Cermis | Epic Climb Highlights
videos.description:
Relive the heart-pounding finale of the 2025-26 Tour de Ski in Val di Fiemme, Italy! American superstar Jessie Diggins fought relentlessly up the brutal Alpe Cermis in the 10km mass start freestyle Final Climb, finishing in 2nd place on the stage – but her strong lead held firm to secure the overall Tour de Ski victory! 🏆

Entering the day with a comfortable buffer, Diggins managed the pressure perfectly against fierce competition from Heidi Weng and others, crossing the line just behind the stage winner to claim her third career Tour de Ski title. This triumphant performance caps an incredible tour and boosts momentum heading into the 2026 Olympics.

Jessie Diggins continues to make history for U.S. cross-country skiing – pure inspiration!

🔔 Subscribe for more cross-country skiing highlights, Jessie Diggins updates, and FIS World Cup coverage!
👍 Like if you're proud of Jessie's grit!
💬 Comment: What's your favorite moment from this Tour de Ski?

#JessieDiggins #TourDeSki #ValDiFiemme #AlpeCermis #CrossCountrySkiing #FISWorldCup #Skiing #FinalClimb #Olympics2026

videos.title: Highlights Tour de Ski Val di Fiemme 10 Km Women
Fiemme 2013 - Italian Survival Kit - Lesson 4: Singing Italian
videos.description:
The Nordic World Ski Championships Trentino Fiemme 2013 are approaching and now it's the right time to start studying some basic features of the Italian culture that will help you to survive during the upcoming World Championships.

Cristian «Zorro» Zorzi and Andrea «Margy» Longo are the teachers of this particular class composed by former Swiss and German cross-country skiers Juerg «Capo» Capol and Peter «Schlicky» Schlickenrieder, and former Austrian ski-jumper Andreas «Goldy» Goldberger.

Fourth lesson: How to sing like a real Italian!

videos.title: Val di Fiemme - Lavazè: Il paradiso degli Sci di Fondo
videos.description:
Siamo andati presso il comprensorio di Lavazè, in Val di fiemme, in compagnia di 
tre giovani campioni: Alessandro Pittin, Veronica Gianmoena e Annika Sieff. 
Vi daremo qualche consiglio sul fondo e vi faremo scoprire il paradiso di questo sport,  80 chilometri di piste da fondo che saranno tra le protagoniste delle Olimpiadi  MilanoCortina2026.

In collaborazione con Visit Trentino, Volkswagen Veicoli Commerciali e Volchem

SI ringrazia:
Azienda per il Turismo Val di Fiemme - https://www.visitfiemme.it/it/inverno
Centro Fondo Passo Lavazè -  https://lavaze.com/it
Alessandro Pittin
Veronica Gianmoena
Annika Sieff

videos.title: Dolomiti Ski Jazz Festival: Ola Onabule and  Roma Jazz Band. Georgia On My Mind
videos.description: Ola Onabule vocals, James Ahwai bass, Anselmo Paolone guitar, Gianluca Buratti piano, Angelo Strizzi drums. Dolomiti Ski Jazz Festival 2011. Amazing vocal performance by the great Ola. Check the guitar solo at 2:25
